recommendations.title: Harriet
recommendations.overview: The extraordinary tale of Harriet Tubman's escape from slavery and transformation into one of America's greatest heroes. Her courage, ingenuity and tenacity freed hundreds of slaves and changed the course of history.

recommendations.title: Eve's Bayou
recommendations.overview: Summer heats up in rural Louisiana beside Eve’s Bayou, 1962, as the Batiste family tries to survive the secrets they’ve kept and the betrayals they’ve endured.

recommendations.title: Whitney Houston: I Wanna Dance with Somebody
recommendations.overview: The joyous, emotional, heartbreaking celebration of the life and music of Whitney Houston, the greatest female R&B pop vocalist of all time. Tracking her journey from obscurity to musical superstardom.

recommendations.title: The Caveman's Valentine
recommendations.overview: Romulus, a misunderstood musician turned recluse hiding from personal demons in a New York City cave, finds the frozen body of a young drifter in a tree. The authorities, including his police officer daughter, claim the death is accidental. Romulus i

recommendations.title: School Daze
recommendations.overview: Fraternity and sorority members clash with other students at a historically black college during homecoming weekend.

recommendations.title: The King of Comedy
recommendations.overview: Aspiring comic Rupert Pupkin attempts to achieve success in show business by stalking his idol, a late night talk-show host who craves his own privacy.

recommendations.title: Wreck-It Ralph
recommendations.overview: Wreck-It Ralph is the 9-foot-tall, 643-pound villain of an arcade video game named Fix-It Felix Jr., in which the game's titular hero fixes buildings that Ralph destroys. Wanting to prove he can be a good guy and not just a villain, Ralph escapes his

recommendations.title: Ralph Breaks the Internet
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Adventure, Science Fiction, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Video game bad guy Ralph and fellow misfit Vanellope von Schweetz must risk it all by traveling to the World Wide Web in search of a replacement part to save Vanellope's video game, Sugar Rush. In way over their heads, Ralph and Vanellope rely on the

recommendations.title: Shadow People
recommendations.overview: A radio talk show host unravels a conspiracy about encounters with mysterious beings known as The Shadow People and their role in the unexplained deaths of several hundred victims in the 1980s.

recommendations.title: Good Morning, Vietnam
recommendations.overview: A disk jockey goes to Vietnam to work for the Armed Forces Radio Service. While he becomes popular among the troops, his superiors disapprove of his humor.
